items.title: Cathie Wood Goes Bargain Hunting: 3 Stocks She Just Bought
items.author: Rick Munarriz
items.description: Cathie Wood, the co-founder and CEO of Ark Invest, has been slowing the pace of her portfolio moves lately. However, she still made some notable purchases on Monday, increasing her existing positions in Amazon, GitLab, and 10x Genomics.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Amazon's stock has rallied 48% this year, and Wall Street analysts remain bullish on the company's future, with one analyst raising his price target to $290, representing a 29% gain in the coming year.

GitLab's revenue is slowing, but it has consistently beaten Wall Street profit targets and has a strong customer retention rate. Cathie Wood sees a bargain in the stock, which is trading just below where it was a year ago.

10x Genomics is one of the market's biggest disappointments of 2024, with the stock trading 74% lower this year. While the company's differentiated platform offers long-term promise, its revenue declined in the latest quarter, and profitability is several years away.
